shelter_name: Mostly Mutts Animal Rescue & Adoption, Inc.
blurb:
The name is Fatty, he's about two months old, he weighs roughly 1.5 pounds, and he is a tuxedo kitten with a long fluffy coat and absolutely no idea how much trouble he's about to be in the best possible way. He came to Mostly Mutts from animal control with his siblings, all part of a Silent Movie themed litter, and right now he's spending his days exploring every corner of the shelter's Kitty Room, chasing crinkle balls, batting at wand toys, and then absolutely crashing in a kitten pile when the energy runs out.

He's sweet, playful, litter trained, and already microchipped. He'll need his kitten vaccine series finished out as he grows, and he's not yet neutered, which gets handled as he gets older. Nothing complicated, just the normal stuff that comes with adopting a kitten this young.

Fatty gets along well with his siblings, so he'd likely do great with another cat at home. Kids are probably fine as long as they're gentle and know how to handle something very small and very bouncy. A home that's ready to kitten-proof the place and commit to a little chaos for a few months is going to have a really good time with this one.

Fatty is available through Mostly Mutts Animal Rescue in Kennesaw. Email or call to ask about meeting him.
scoring_notes:
• Tuxedo kitten with a playful name and irresistible energy is a near-guaranteed reader favorite and click driver
• Silent Movie litter theme adds a fun, shareable hook that elevates the blurb above standard kitten fare
• Young age and shelter origin from animal control suggest a recent intake, limiting urgency but not newsletter charm
